titleStmt.title: SII 24.217: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 217. (A.R. No. 43 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by Gōmaḍattu Nārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭa of Vikramaśōḻachaturvēdimaṅgalam to the bhaṭṭas of Kāliṅgarāyar-agaram, which was separated from the former village. The record is engraved in continuation of No. 213 and is dated in the 12th year, Tulā, ba. 10, Wednesday, Maghā, corresponding to A.D. 1308, October 9, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·07; f.d.n. ·19.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koṟccaṭapaṉmarāṉaEngraved in continuation of the previous inscription.tirupuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu paniraṇṭāvatu tulā nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum putankiḻamaiyum peṟṟa makattu nāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam
vikramacoḻaccaturvedimaṅkalattuk koma(ṭa)ṭattu nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉeṉ Ivvūril veṟu piṟinta kāliṅkarāyar Akarattu paṭṭakaḷukku nāṉ dharmmadāna pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu . Ivvakarattukku Āṟṟileṟa vaḻikku nāṉ kuṭutta Ivvūril Enṉutāṉa viḷainilaṅkaḷil tiruvaraṅkavatikku kiḻakku vikramaccoḻa vāykkālukku teṟkku Iraṇṭām kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcatirattu Aravaṇaivāykkālukku teṟkku Eṉṉutāna pantalppuḷinilattu vaṭakku vāykkālai Aṭutta tenvarampum Icceyyil melaip paḻaiya varampuṭaṉ Aṭuttu Iṭaviṭṭa karaiyileyuṟa viṭṭa Aṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl kuḻi Āṟu Ikkuḻi Āṟum taṅkaḷukku Udakapūrvamāka kuṭutten
Ittāl vanta parappu maṭakkum kaṭamai kuṭimaiykaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum tāne Iṟuttu tarakkaṭaveṉākavum Ikkuḻi Āṟum candrādittyavaraiyāka Iṟuttuk kuṭukkak kaṭavenākavum Ikkuḻi Āṟum Ivarkaḷukku dānādhanma vikrayaṅkaḷukku Urittāvatākavum Ippaṭi nāṉum Eṉ santānamuḷppaṭa Iṟukkakkaṭavomāka vum Ippaṭi samvadittu dharmmadānam paṇṇikkuṭutten kāliṅkarāyaccaturvedi maṅkalattu paṭṭakaḷukku Innārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉen . Ippaṭi ceyyum Iṭattup paḻaiya varampu Iraṇṭaṭiyum viṭṭa kuḻi Āṟu nāl Aṭi Iraṇṭum Āka nālaṭikku Otta vaḻivarampu Ākkik koḷvarkaḷaākavum § Ippaṭikku Ivai nārāyaṇa ppaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivar colla Iccātaṉam Eḻutiṉamaikku
Ivai vainateya paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coṭṭai ciṅkappirāṉ paṭṭa ṉen sa- Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kārampic ceṭṭu yajñasiṅhabhaṭṭaṉeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 24.217 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
